Well, it's great having you here.

I'm 66 years old.
I'm retired from George Power Company.

Pretty much it on that.
So you worked on the high tension lines then?

If you don't, it'll definitely straighten your string.
You didn't find out what it was that you saw until about four or five years ago.
How did you find out what they were?
Well, I've been watching a lot of these different shows on Bigfoot, Dogman.
And one night I was looking and I seen one that looked exactly like the one that I had seen.
And I told my wife, I said, that's it.
That's what I seen.
Before then, I was just guessing.
And I didn't really know.

Yeah, I bet you're ready to fall out of your chair.
Yeah, I was.
I was up running across the house.
It was just amazing.
Yeah, I'll bet you were.
Understandably so, too.
Considering how you've had more than one encounter with these guys, do you think there's something about you that draws them to you or do you think it's just dumb luck?
Well, I'm not really sure. I wasn't expecting nothing that first time. I mean, I was just driving along, but when I seen it and a few years later, then I see the other one.

I don I can really say whether that there you know something about it must be attracting them to me I don really know Well you had two encounters If you have a third then that almost removes all doubt that there has to be something about you but there hopefully that third
